title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Globalfoundries Singapore PTE, Ltd
body: "Application number 5247  Applicant GlobalFoundries, Inc., Globalfoundries Europe Ltd and Globalfoundries Singapore PTE, Ltd objected to the name used by Globalfoundries Singapore PTE, Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 20 June 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Globalfoundries Singapore PTE, Ltd is changed to 15771933, Ltd. "
